title: Build a Movie Search Application
description: Create a movie search app with debounced queries, paginated results, and production-grade UI states — optimized like Netflix or IMDb search.
requirements: Controlled search input with debounced API trigger (300–500ms delay)
Custom useDebounce hook extracted to src/hooks/useDebounce.ts
Fetch movies from TMDB API (or equivalent) with generic paginated response types
Store API key in VITE_TMDB_API_KEY environment variable
Empty state when search returns no movies
Error UI with retry for failed requests
Pagination controls for next/previous pages of results
Movie cards showing title, poster, and release year
Responsive layout on mobile and desktop
acceptanceCriteria: Typing 'batman' triggers at most one API call per debounce window — not one per keystroke
Page 2 loads different results than page 1
Empty search shows prompt state; zero results shows 'No movies found'
Retry button re-attempts the last failed query
No infinite network requests in DevTools Network tab
npm run build passes with strict TypeScript
Repository pushed to Git with .env excluded via .gitignore
hints: Create src/types/movie.ts with Movie and PaginatedResponse<T> generic interfaces.
Separate fetchMovies(query, page) in src/api/movies.ts — keep components thin.
useDebounce returns a delayed copy of the search term — fetch when debouncedSearch changes.
Reset page to 1 when the debounced search term changes.
Use cleanup flag or AbortController from Day 08 to handle stale responses.

bonus.title: Search polish
requirements: Extract useMovieSearch hook combining debounce, fetch, and pagination state
Show skeleton cards during loading instead of a bare spinner
Display total result count from API pagination metadata

debuggingScenarios.title: Multiple API requests on every keystroke
debuggingScenarios.symptom: Network tab shows a request for b, ba, bat, batm, batman
debuggingScenarios.cause: Fetching directly on input onChange without debouncing
debuggingScenarios.fix: Extract useDebounce; fetch only when debouncedSearch changes in useEffect

debuggingScenarios.title: Stale state — old results flash after new search
debuggingScenarios.symptom: Previous movie list briefly appears before new results load
debuggingScenarios.cause: Not clearing results or not tracking request order when query changes
debuggingScenarios.fix: Clear movies when query changes; use cleanup flag or AbortController to ignore stale responses

debuggingScenarios.title: Wrong dependency array
debuggingScenarios.symptom: Fetch runs on every render or page state causes duplicate fetches
debuggingScenarios.cause: Missing deps, unstable object deps, or page and search in wrong effect
debuggingScenarios.fix: Separate effects or single effect with [debouncedSearch, page]; run exhaustive-deps lint
